headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 16, 2026**
article:
The Philadelphia Phillies secured a thrilling 11-9 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Kyle Schwarber leading the charge with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance. In other notable games, the Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, while the Detroit Tigers fell to the Toronto Blue Jays in a closely contested matchup.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Heliot Ramos (San Francisco Giants) who was placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right quad strain. Other notable injuries include Ben Joyce (Los Angeles Angels) with a 60-day injured list stint due to right shoulder inflammation, and Trevor Story (Boston Red Sox) who was placed on the 10-day injured list retroactive to May 15, 2026, with a sports hernia.

The Athletics made several notable roster moves, trading Junior Perez to the Chicago White Sox for LHP Jackson Nove. The team also traded RHP Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for 2B Alika Williams, and RHP Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash. Additionally, the Athletics acquired LHP José Suarez from the Seattle Mariners for cash.

top_news.title: **Phillies Take Thrilling 11-9 Win Over Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies outlasted the Pittsburgh Pirates in a high-scoring matchup, securing an 11-9 victory. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance, driving in 5 runs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Orioles in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, securing a crucial win. Zack Littell led the Nationals to victory with a strong 5.0 IP performance, earning the win.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2 in a closely contested game. Andrés Giménez led the Blue Jays with 2 RBI, while Trey Yesavage pitched 6 strong innings for the Blue Jays, striking out 6 and allowing 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Guardians in Thrilling 7-6 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a hard-fought win over the Cleveland Guardians, outlasting their opponents by a single run. Matt McLain led the Reds' offense with a strong performance, collecting 2 hits, including a home run, and driving in 3 runs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Edge Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with a final score of 2-1. Impact hitters for the Blue Jays included Yohendrick Piñango, Daulton Varsho, Kevin McGonigle, and Matt Vierling.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Royals 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 2-4 victory over the Kansas City Royals in their latest matchup. Impact hitters for the Cardinals included Jac Caglianone, Nathan Church, and Victor Scott II.

top_news.title: **Giants Place Heliot Ramos on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: San Francisco Giants left fielder Heliot Ramos has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right quad strain. The injury occurred on an unspecified date.

top_news.title: **White Sox Acquire Junior Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago White Sox have acquired center fielder Junior Perez in a trade with the Oakland Athletics. Perez joins the White Sox in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove.
